'''wamata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:docility|docility]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docility|docility]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wamata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæmætæth|wæmætæth]] || [[word:wæmætæj|wæmætæj]] || [[word:wæmætæsh|wæmætæsh]] || [[word:wæmætæ|wæmætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wamamatath|wamamatath]] || [[word:wamamataj|wamamataj]] || [[word:wamamatash|wamamatash]] || [[word:wamamata|wamamata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wamatath|wamatath]] || [[word:wamataj|wamataj]] || [[word:wamatash|wamatash]] || [[word:wamata|wamata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wamaftafth|wamaftafth]] || [[word:wamaftafj|wamaftafj]] || [[word:wamaftafsh|wamaftafsh]] || [[word:wamaftaf|wamaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wamatatha|wamatatha]] || [[word:wamataja|wamataja]] || [[word:wamatasha|wamatasha]] || [[word:wamataka|wamataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wamatath|wamatath]] || [[word:wamataj|wamataj]] || [[word:wamatash|wamatash]] || [[word:wamata|wamata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wamatathal|wamatathal]] || [[word:wamatajal|wamatajal]] || [[word:wamatashal|wamatashal]] || [[word:wamatakal|wamatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wamataathatha|wamataathatha]] || [[word:wamataajaja|wamataajaja]] || [[word:wamataashasha|wamataashasha]] || [[word:wamataaka|wamataaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wamatathan|wamatathan]] || [[word:wamatajan|wamatajan]] || [[word:wamatashan|wamatashan]] || [[word:wamatakan|wamatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wamatathaoro|wamatathaoro]] || [[word:wamatajaoro|wamatajaoro]] || [[word:wamatashaoro|wamatashaoro]] || [[word:wamatakaoro|wamatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
